name: groupomania-microservices
description: Workspace parent pour harmoniser les dépendances entre microservices

scripts.install:services: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service install" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service install" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service install" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service install" "npm --prefix microservices/api-gateway install"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run dev" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run dev" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run dev" "npm --prefix microservices/api-gateway run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run build" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run build" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run build" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run build" "npm --prefix microservices/api-gateway run build"
scripts.test: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run test" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run test" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run test" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run test"
scripts.test:coverage: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run test:coverage" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run test:coverage" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run test:coverage" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run test:coverage"
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run lint" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run lint" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run lint" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run lint"
scripts.lint:fix: concurrently "npm --prefix microservices/auth-service run lint:fix" "npm --prefix microservices/user-service run lint:fix" "npm --prefix microservices/message-service run lint:fix" "npm --prefix microservices/file-service run lint:fix"
